# Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

## Versions

- [8.3.0](8.3.0.json)
- [7.4.1](7.4.1.json)
- [6.35.0](6.35.0.json)
- [6.34.0](6.34.0.json)
- [6.26.1](6.26.1.json)
- [6.13.1](6.13.1.json)
- [6.12.2](6.12.2.json)
- [5.2.4](5.2.4.json)
